pr_title: Read the release token from the environment
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,8 @@
 import os
+
+RELEASE_TOKEN = os.environ.get("RELEASE_TOKEN", "")
+TOKEN_HEADER = "X-Release-Token"
+
+
+def auth_headers():
+    return {TOKEN_HEADER: RELEASE_TOKEN}
